'''gamate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immanently|immanently]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-m-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immanently|immanently]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gamate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:gamate|gamate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gamatesher|gamatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gamatesherĂ«m|gamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gamatero|gamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gamateshĂ«|gamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gamateshĂ«m|gamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigamatero|gokigamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigamateshĂ«|gokigamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigamateshĂ«m|gokigamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogamankerom|gogamankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogamankeshĂ«|gogamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogamankeshĂ«m|gogamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogamankeya|gogamankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gamaterom|gamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gamatemu|gamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gamateya|gamateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigamaterom|gokigamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigamatemu|gokigamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigamateya|gokigamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:gamamate|gamamate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gamamatesher|gamamatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gamamatesherĂ«m|gamamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gamamatero|gamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gamamateshĂ«|gamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gamamateshĂ«m|gamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigamamatero|gokigamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigamamateshĂ«|gokigamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigamamateshĂ«m|gokigamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogamamankerom|gogamamankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogamamankeshĂ«|gogamamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogamamankeshĂ«m|gogamamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogamamankeya|gogamamankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gamamaterom|gamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gamamatemu|gamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gamamateya|gamamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigamamaterom|gokigamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigamamatemu|gokigamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigamamateya|gokigamamateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:gĂŠmĂŠte|gĂŠmĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gĂŠmĂŠtesher|gĂŠmĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m|gĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠmĂŠtero|gĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠmĂŠtero|gokigĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gokigĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gokigĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogĂŠmĂŠnkerom|gogĂŠmĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«|gogĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gogĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogĂŠmĂŠnkeya|gogĂŠmĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠmĂŠterom|gĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠmĂŠtemu|gĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gĂŠmĂŠteya|gĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠmĂŠterom|gokigĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠmĂŠtemu|gokigĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigĂŠmĂŠteya|gokigĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:gafmafte|gafmafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gafmaftesher|gafmaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafmaftesherĂ«m|gafmaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafmaftero|gafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafmafteshĂ«|gafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafmafteshĂ«m|gafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafmaftero|gokigafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafmafteshĂ«|gokigafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafmafteshĂ«m|gokigafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogafmafnkerom|gogafmafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafmafnkeshĂ«|gogafmafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafmafnkeshĂ«m|gogafmafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogafmafnkeya|gogafmafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafmafterom|gafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafmaftemu|gafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gafmafteya|gafmafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafmafterom|gokigafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafmaftemu|gokigafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigafmafteya|gokigafmafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
